slides.headline: Streamline your VA school certification process
slides.body: Automate certifications, track compliance, and support student veterans.

slides.headline: Automate Certifications
slides.body: Easily manage and update GI Bill® certifications.

slides.headline: Track Compliance
slides.body: Stay on top of required compliance reports and deadlines.

slides.headline: Support Student Veterans
slides.body: Ensure all students receive the benefits they deserve.

slides.headline: Compliance Matters
slides.body: Meet all VA requirements and avoid potential fines.

slides.headline: Stay Ahead of Changes
slides.body: Prepare for future GI Bill® changes with ease.

outline.caption: Streamline your VA school certification process with VASCO Assistant Pro. Easily automate certifications, track compliance, and support student veterans. Don't miss out on the pre-launch pricing. Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 5, as it could benefit from a more compelling headline to match the others.
